issues.message: Project and capstone topics must include a believable real-world scenario, learner role, concrete files/tables/folders, and a useful deliverable.

Project step "module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-task-2" does not appear to start from the previous step's working solution/workspace. Progressive module projects and capstones must chain starter state forward.

Project step "module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-task-3" does not appear to start from the previous step's working solution/workspace. Progressive module projects and capstones must chain starter state forward.
